## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` (formatting)
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` (no lints)
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` (tests pass)
- [ ] New/changed code is covered by tests (the coverage gate requires 100% lines)
- [ ] Docs/README/CHANGELOG updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
